series_metadata.series_description: File contains petitions and records for "Ohio Special" pressure vessels.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Transfer microfilm to Archives. ; Paper: Retain records until records are supserseded by new information or until records are no longer created by this agency, then microfilm records. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy hard copy records., Microform: Archives ; Paper: Shred
